subcodes.first_line: We ask God to send one of His servants, and to detach him from Contingent Being, and to adorn his heart
subcodes.first_line_orig: نسئل الله بان یبعث احدا من عباده و ینقطعه عن الامکان و یزین قلبه بطراز
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @petitions to authorities
